findings.title: Missing Integrity
findings.owasp: A08:2021 - Software and Data Integrity Failures
findings.message: This tag is missing an 'integrity' subresource integrity attribute. The 'integrity' attribute allows for the browser to verify that externally hosted files (for example from a CDN) are delivered without unexpected manipulation. Without this attribute, if an attacker can modify the externally hosted resource, this could lead to XSS and other types of attacks. To prevent this, include the base64-encoded cryptographic hash of the resource (file) you’re telling the browser to fetch in the 'integrity' attribute for all externally hosted files.
findings.remediation: Implement sanitization/validation on input parameters. Restrict function permissions or update vulnerable implementation blocks.
findings.suggestedDiff:
<<<< CURRENT CODE
requires login
==== SUGGESTED FIX
// Review standard mitigation guidelines for html.security.audit.missing-integrity.missing-integrity.
// Sanitize input, restrict access controls, or apply configuration limits.
>>>>

findings.title: Wildcard Cors
findings.message: CORS policy allows any origin (using wildcard '*'). This is insecure and should be avoided.
findings.remediation: Implement sanitization/validation on input parameters. Restrict function permissions or update vulnerable implementation blocks.
findings.suggestedDiff:
<<<< CURRENT CODE
requires login
==== SUGGESTED FIX
// Review standard mitigation guidelines for python.fastapi.security.wildcard-cors.wildcard-cors.
// Sanitize input, restrict access controls, or apply configuration limits.
>>>>

findings.title: Sensitive Data Logging
findings.message: Sensitive variables (like password, token, key) appear to be logged directly. This can leak credentials into log files, SIEM platforms, or console outputs.
findings.remediation: Do not log sensitive variables. Redact or sanitize credentials before printing to console or log systems.
findings.suggestedDiff:
<<<< CURRENT CODE
logger.debug("Getting page %s", redact_auth_from_url(url))
==== SUGGESTED FIX
// Redact sensitive details before logging
logger.info("Transaction processed for user " + userId);
>>>>

findings.title: Internal IP/Domain Leakage
findings.message: Internal IP address found hardcoded in source. While not a direct exploit, exposing internal network topologies aids attackers in mapping out lateral movement strategies within environments.
findings.codeSnippet: Example: returns True if ip = 192.168.1.1 and net = 192.168.1.0/24
findings.remediation: Avoid hardcoding internal networks. Externalize connection parameters into dynamic environment configs.
findings.suggestedDiff:
<<<< CURRENT CODE
Example: returns True if ip = 192.168.1.1 and net = 192.168.1.0/24
==== SUGGESTED FIX
const internalServiceIp = process.env.INTERNAL_SERVICE_IP;
>>>>

findings.title: Debug Flag Enabled
findings.message: Active debug mode or flags found in code. Leaving debugging enabled in production environments can expose verbose stack traces, server internals, and interactive consoles to attackers.
findings.remediation: Disable debug mode for production deployments. Drive configuration parameters through environment variables.
findings.suggestedDiff:
<<<< CURRENT CODE
app = Starlette(debug=True, routes=routes)
==== SUGGESTED FIX
const debugMode = process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production';
>>>>
